scripts.bootstrap: npm --prefix api-gateway ci && npm --prefix r2-gateway ci && npm --prefix seo-gateway ci && npm --prefix terminal-gateway ci
scripts.migrations:create: npm --prefix api-gateway exec wrangler d1 migrations create blog-db
scripts.d1:shell: npm --prefix api-gateway exec wrangler d1 execute blog-db --local --command 'SELECT 1'
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix api-gateway run typecheck && npm --prefix r2-gateway run typecheck && npm --prefix seo-gateway run typecheck && npm --prefix terminal-gateway run typecheck
scripts.test: npm --prefix api-gateway run test && npm --prefix r2-gateway run test && npm --prefix seo-gateway run test && npm --prefix terminal-gateway run test
